title: pelargonium × castum
intro: Pelargonium × castum, a hybrid species of the Pelargonium genus, is a type of flowering plant commonly known as the Cape Geranium or Barberton Geranium. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium × castum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant's medicinal properties can be extracted through various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
